changeSet.author: AI-Assistant
changeSet.comment: Add Preclinical and Clinical Trials page (Page 14) to Virology workflow template
changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO clinlims.notebook_page (id, notebook_id, title, page_order, instructions, last_updated) SELECT nextval('clinlims.notebook_page_seq'), n.id, 'Preclinical & Clinical Trials', 14, 'Manage preclinical (animal) and clinical (human) trials - track trial phases, outcomes, and regulatory submissions', now() FROM clinlims.notebook n WHERE n.title = 'Virology and Vaccine Unit' AND n.is_template = true AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM clinlims.notebook_page np WHERE np.notebook_id = n.id AND np.page_order = 14 );

changeSet.author: AI-Assistant
changeSet.comment: Add Preclinical and Clinical Trials page to existing Virology notebook instances
changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO clinlims.notebook_page (id, notebook_id, title, page_order, instructions, last_updated) SELECT nextval('clinlims.notebook_page_seq'), n.id, 'Preclinical & Clinical Trials', 14, 'Manage preclinical (animal) and clinical (human) trials - track trial phases, outcomes, and regulatory submissions', now() FROM clinlims.notebook n WHERE (n.title LIKE '%Virology%' OR n.title LIKE '%Vaccine%') AND n.is_template = false AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM clinlims.notebook_page np WHERE np.notebook_id = n.id AND np.page_order = 14 );
